title: feat: add dirtberry and claude-airforce models via api.airforce
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fresh berries and new brains
gist.blurb: We just wired up the dirtberry image model and a community-provided Claude Sonnet 4.6 to the API. Quick realistic pixels and top-tier text generation, ready for your prompts.
gist.summary: Added the dirtberry image model and claude-airforce text model via the api.airforce community provider.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate quick realistic images with the 'dirtberry' model and access Claude Sonnet 4.6 via the 'claude-airforce' text model endpoint.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'dirtberry' (berry/nature) and 'claude-airforce' (aviation). Visual: The pollinations bee wearing a tiny aviator hat, holding a glowing pixelated berry. A retro terminal nearby shows text. Cozy, warm, nature meets tech.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, happily holding a glowing pixelated berry next to a retro computer terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
